name: Iter20 — 3D review cards have preserve-3d class and ScoreBar puck is visible
description: After analyzing a PR and viewing the review report, the review category cards should have the preserve-3d CSS class applied for 3D tilt micro-interactions, and the ScoreBar should display a circular score puck with a visible numeric score.

planSteps.description: Click the first review row to open the review detail page at /review/:id
Verify the review detail page loads with a full review report visible
Verify the Quality Score section shows a circular score indicator displaying a numeric score value
Verify at least one review category card (Bugs, Security, Performance, Clarity, or Positives) is visible on the page
Hover the mouse cursor over one of the review category cards
Verify the review category card has a hover state — the card remains visible and interactive without any visual breakage or layout shift
Verify the DOM contains elements with the CSS class preserve-3d applied to the review cards section
